programme.title: beIN STORY
programme.desc: beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. L'émission est présentée par le ou la journaliste et l'un(e) des consultant(e)s du sport concerné. Evènement imprévu, athlète au destin tragique ou moment crucial qui a changé pour toujours une discipline sportive, beIN STORY présente de grands documentai

programme.title: Pourquoi moi ?
programme.desc: Le documentaire "Pourquoi moi ?", réalisé par la cellule reportage de beIN SPORTS, permet de comprendre la mentalité des plus grands champions. Comment fonctionne leur cerveau ? Comment leur mental est-il façonné ? Pour répondre à ces questions et définir leur profil, John Ferreira et Julien Grès sont allés à la rencontre de Nikola et Luka Karabatic, Thierry Omeyer, Justine Dupont et Brahim Asloum

programme.desc: Nine years ago, Tijjani Reijnders was stacking shelves at a local supermarket. Now, after lighting up Serie A with AC Milan, the Dutch international is making a name for himself with Manchester City in the Premier League. programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. Against the backdrop of the streets and stadiums that shaped him, he recounts his rise through adversity, his explosive emergence in the Premier League with Wigan, and his evolution into a title-winning, Champions League-chasing leader

programme.desc: Whether it was for club or country, Stuart Pearce was one of English football's greatest servants, with a reputation as a fiercely uncompromising defender. programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Maya Yoshida quietly became one of the Premier League's most dependable defenders during his years at Southampton, but his influence reached far beyond the pitch. In this episode, we look back at Yoshida's journey from Japan to England's top-flight, his role as a leader for club and country, and the cultural bridge he helped build along the way.

programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30.
